summary: Iteration 2 — comprehensive backend (20/20 v5.5 targeted) + frontend e2e of MetanoSRGAN Elite v5.5. All 20 new v5.5 review-request items pass on the public preview URL. Auth-first routing redirects / → /login; /login HTML contains no admin credentials; admin login by email and by username both return access_token; /api/system/diagnostics reports resumen.todo_real=true and resumen.datos_simulados=false with 409 Supabase detections, CH4 1411 ppb (Open-Meteo real), and Mapbox token configured; /api/v55/plans returns the 3 plans (regional 800, operacional 2500, enterprise 8000); /api/v55/plans/me returns the user's plan; /api/v55/satellite/layers gates SAR per plan (regional=false, enterprise=true); /api/v55/carbon/credits and /api/v55/export/pdf return 403 for regional and 200/application-pdf for enterprise; admin can create user with plan+empresa and the values persist on GET; /api/pipeline/run accepts POST {} (200) and updates last_execution; WebSocket /api/ws/live is live; /api/v55/audit/chain reports verificacion.integro=true; /api/detections returns real fields (operador, fecha_deteccion, score_prioridad, activo_cercano) and /api/detections/map returns 5+ features with real lat/lon. Frontend e2e: regional → /app shows plan pill, '🔄 Actualizar datos', Supabase/Sentinel-5P/Open-Meteo/Salud indicators; Mapa loads Mapbox satellite-streets with 4+ detection markers, layer controls, base-style dropdown, geolocation button; mobile (480x800) header scales and tabs scroll horizontally with 🔒 on locked features (ML Persistencia, Compliance, Créditos CO2 for regional). Admin panel has EXACTLY 5 sections (Dashboard, Usuarios, Planes, Auditoría, Salud Sistema) — no Carbon/Compliance/Exports/API Keys/Webhooks — and the dashboard shows Plan Regional=3, Operacional=0, Enterprise=2 plus the 'EJECUTAR PIPELINE AHORA' button. ⚠ The HIGH bug from iteration 1 (/api/ml/predictions → 500 numpy.radians on null wind_deg) is STILL present and unresolved.

critical.issue: STILL returns 500 — numpy.radians fails on null/string wind_deg. iteration_1 reported and not yet fixed in /app/backend/ml_persistence_v37.py:139.

action_items: Fix /api/ml/predictions 500 in /app/backend/ml_persistence_v37.py:139 — coerce wind_deg/wind_speed/ch4_ppb to float at the boundary (e.g. `wind_deg = float(event.get('wind_deg') or 0.0)`) before calling np.radians. This is the same bug surfaced in iteration_1 and is the only failing endpoint in the entire suite.
critical_code_review_comments: ml_persistence_v37._extract_features still does not validate numeric inputs from Supabase — needs type coercion or pydantic validation at the row boundary.
/app/backend/server.py is large; consider splitting v5.5 routers (carbon, compliance, exports, keys, webhooks, audit, analytics, plans, satellite) into APIRouter modules.

Frontend served by static-server.js with relative /api paths works in preview but Render production deploy should be explicitly verified — REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL was missing from /app/frontend/.env (created during this run for the test fixture).

success_rate.backend: 100% on v5.5 targeted suite (20/20). Combined with iter1 suite: 54/55 (98%). Single failure = the unresolved /api/ml/predictions bug from iter1.
success_rate.frontend: 100% on the 7 tested flows: auth-first redirect, login HTML hygiene, regional login → /app, plan pill + indicators, Mapbox map with markers, mobile responsive with 🔒 gating, admin login → /admin with exactly 5 sections.

test_credentials: Admin ortizisacc18@gmail.com / 212228IsaiJosias@ ✓ ; regional jr@ecopetrol.com / Ecopetrol2026! ✓ ; enterprise enterprise@ecopetrol.com / Enterprise2026! ✓ — all three log in successfully and route correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test creates a transient TEST_ent_<ts> user with plan=enterprise/empresa=TestCo via /api/admin/users, validates persistence via GET /api/admin/users, then deletes it. No leftover data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two test files in /app/backend/tests/: backend_test.py (iter1 regression, 36 tests covering auth/health/admin CRUD/carbon/compliance/exports/keys/webhooks/audit/analytics/WS/v5.4) and test_v55_features.py (iter2, 20 tests focused on the v5.5 feature gating: auth-first, diagnostics datos_simulados=false, plans 800/2500/8000, satellite SAR gating, carbon/pdf 403 for regional + 200 for enterprise, admin create-with-plan, pipeline/run, WS snapshot, audit chain, detection real fields). Run all: `python -m pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. Frontend testids: login-{username-input,password-input,submit-btn}, nav-{dashboard,users,plans,audit,health}. Admin panel correctly shows ONLY 5 nav items. Regional dashboard correctly shows 🔒 on ML/Compliance/Carbon/Exports tabs. Mapbox loads with detection markers near Puerto Berrio and Barrancabermeja (Colombia, Magdalena Medio).
rca_of_the_issue: The /api/ml/predictions 500 RCA from iteration_1 still applies verbatim: ml_persistence_v37._extract_features calls np.radians(event['wind_deg']) without coercing wind_deg to float; when Supabase returns NULL/string the numpy ufunc raises TypeError and the endpoint surfaces 500. Reproduction: `curl https://wingman-29b255c3-66da-47d4-b4ef-fc21ee142b5a.preview.emergentagent.com/api/ml/predictions` → 500. Fix: cast at boundary `wind_deg = float(event.get('wind_deg') or 0.0)` (and same for wind_speed, ch4_ppb) inside _extract_features and/or filter rows missing those fields in _build_dataset.
